seoTitle: Foxdale vs Frankfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Foxdale and Frankfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Foxdale and Frankfield.
heading: Foxdale vs Frankfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Foxdale, Queensland and Frankfield, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Foxdale has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Frankfield (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Foxdale or Frankfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Foxdale has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Frankfield scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Foxdale scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Frankfield scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Foxdale or Frankfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Foxdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
